query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vortexBets (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  playerName VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  betAmount DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,
  multiplier DECIMAL(10,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  winAmount DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  netAmount DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  balanceAfter DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  resultData TEXT,
  isWin TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_vortexBets_userId (userId),
  INDEX idx_vortexBets_createdAt (createdAt)
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  playerName VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  betAmount DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,
  multiplier DECIMAL(10,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  winAmount DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  netAmount DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  balanceAfter DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  resultData TEXT,
  isWin TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_vortexBets_userId (userId),
  INDEX idx_vortexBets_createdAt (createdAt)
